summary: Well-structured Pester test suite with clear semantic organization across three tiers: unit tests (artifact handling, retention policies, formatting), workflow structure validation, and integration testing via act. Covers all main requirements including artifact metadata, max-age/count/size policies individually and in combination, deletion planning, dry-run mode, and error handling. Good use of helper functions (New-Artifact), inline fixtures, and external fixture files (case-age.json, case-count.json, case-combined.json). Output format validation uses consistent markers for harness parsing. Workflow tests verify YAML structure, actionlint compliance, and script file references. Primary gaps: limited edge-case testing (empty artifact lists, boundary conditions, identical timestamps), minimal error coverage (only 2 scenarios vs required graceful error handling), and regex-based output assertions are somewhat brittle. Combining-policies tests are strong, validating that Keep/Delete sets never overlap and counts are accurate. Would reliably catch regressions in core functionality but might miss edge cases and error paths.
